attributes.title: Wi-Fi & Network Upgrades
attributes.shortDescription: Enterprise-grade wireless networks with full coverage, VLANs for security, and seamless roaming.
attributes.longDescription:
Enterprise Wi-Fi for Small Businesses

Tired of slow Wi-Fi, dead zones, and devices that won't stay connected? We design and install enterprise-grade wireless networks that deliver fast, reliable coverage throughout your entire space.

What You Get

  • Full Coverage: Eliminate dead zones
  • Fast Performance: Wi-Fi 6/6E technology
  • Seamless Roaming: Move without dropping connection
  • Guest Networks: Isolated guest Wi-Fi

features.title: Site Survey & Planning
features.description: RF analysis to determine optimal access point placement

features.title: VLAN Segmentation
features.description: Separate networks for guests, cameras, and IoT devices

features.title: Remote Management
features.description: Monitor and troubleshoot your network from anywhere

attributes.metaTitle: Enterprise Wi-Fi & Network Upgrades | Houston IT Services
attributes.metaDescription: Professional Wi-Fi installation with full coverage, seamless roaming, and enterprise security for Houston businesses.

attributes.title: IP Cameras & NVR
attributes.shortDescription: PoE security cameras with high-definition recording, remote viewing, motion alerts, and secure storage.
attributes.longDescription:
Professional Security Camera Systems

Protect your business with high-definition IP cameras, secure recording, and remote viewing from anywhere.

What's Included

  • PoE IP Cameras: 4K resolution, night vision
  • NVR or NAS: Network video recorder with storage
  • Remote Access: View from your phone or computer
  • Motion Detection: Smart alerts

features.title: 4K Resolution
features.description: Crystal-clear video with facial recognition quality

features.title: Night Vision
features.description: Infrared LEDs for clear footage in complete darkness

features.title: Smart Alerts
features.description: Motion-triggered notifications sent to your phone

features.title: Secure Remote Access
features.description: View live and recorded footage from anywhere
